summary: Comprehensive testing of Vastunirmana CMS website - Backend 100% pass (27/27 tests), Frontend fully functional with all pages loading correctly

minor.issue: Pages (about, services, contact) return 404 - not seeded in database but API works correctly

issues: Instagram and Quora social links are hardcoded in UI but not present in company_info.social_links database - links point to '#'

action_items: Add Instagram and Quora links to company_info.social_links in database seed or admin panel
Seed page content for about, services, contact pages if dynamic content is needed
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - Pydantic v2 models used correctly with .model_dump()
MongoDB _id is properly converted to string in all API responses
JWT authentication working correctly with proper token validation
All CRUD operations tested and working for all admin endpoints

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all pages load, all navigation works, minor social link data issue)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - existing seed data sufficient for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Frontend pages tested: Homepage, About Us, Services, Contact Us, Projects (Residential, Commercial, Office, Retail), Admin Login, Admin Dashboard. Live Chat widget visible. SEND QUERY dialog working. Social links in footer have Instagram and Quora icons but database only has facebook, twitter, linkedin, youtube links.

frontend: Homepage with hero slider, corporate overview, capabilities, projects, clients, testimonials ✓
Contact Us page at /contact with form and Google Maps ✓
SEND QUERY button opens contact dialog ✓
Footer has social media links including Instagram and Quora icons ✓
Live Chat widget visible at bottom-right ✓
